messages.deleteError: Failed to delete zone "{name}". Please contact support if the problem persists.
messages.wardInUseError: Unable to delete Ward {wardNo}. This ward is currently assigned to rate sections. Please remove all references to this ward before attempting to delete it.

messages.zoneHasWardsError: This zone cannot be deleted because one or more wards are still assigned to it. Please remove all associated wards before attempting deletion.
messages.zoneHasWardsBriefError: Zone {zoneNo} - {description} cannot be deleted while wards are assigned. Remove all wards from this zone first.
messages.zoneInUseError: This zone cannot be deleted because it is currently referenced in Rate Section Master. Please remove all dependencies before deleting this zone.
messages.zoneDeleteGenericError: Unable to delete the zone at this time. Please try again later.
